release_notes: Initial release of 360Ghar Real Estate app for iOS. Features property discovery, swipe-based recommendations, visit scheduling, and agent management.
Initial release of 360Ghar Real Estate app for Android. Features property discovery, swipe-based recommendations, visit scheduling, and agent management.
Initial release of 360Ghar Real Estate web platform. Full-featured property discovery and management accessible from any browser.
Initial release of 360Ghar Short Stays app for iOS. Book short-term stays with full property management and host integration.
Initial release of 360Ghar Short Stays app for Android. Book short-term stays with full property management and host integration.
Initial release of 360Ghar Short Stays web platform. Complete booking experience with host dashboard and property management.
